title: Image Overlay
description: A mod for rendering images or GIFs on screen!
body:
# Image Overlay Mod

**Render images and GIFs directly on your screen!**

## Features
- Render static images and animated GIFs  
- Dynamic positioning and resizing  
- Transparency and rotation controls  
- GUI  
- Slideshows  
- Overlays: render images at fullscren that automatically adapt to your resolution  
- Image rendering via URL (Imgur)
- Rendering layers: Lets you render images/GIFs behind or in front of GUI elements (Hotbar, scoreboard...) Using the GUI, hold "Alt + right click" on an image/GIF to open a context menu and select the preferred option **ONLY WORKS IN 1.21.4 ONWARDS**. *Other features are also in the menu
- Presets
- Twitch integration -> Go to https://imageoverlay.gitbook.io/imageoverlay-docs for the tutorial on how to connect your Twitch account to the ImageOverlay Mod
  

## Commands
| Command | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| `/image help` | List all available commands |
| `/image list` | Show all images/GIFs in your `imageoverlay` folder |
| `/image render <name> <x> <y>` | Display an image/GIF at specified coordinates |
| `/image move <name> <x> <y>` | Move said image/GIF |
| `/image resize <name> <x> <y>` | Modify image/GIF |
| `/image url <name> <width> <size>` | Render image/GIF using an IMGUR URL |
| `/image stop <name>` | Stop rendering an image/GIF |
| `/image preset save <name>` | Saves every image/GIF data as one preset |
| `/image preset list` | Lists all the presets |
| `/image preset load <name>` | Loads saved presets |
| `/image preset delete <name>` | Deletes said preset |

**IN ORDER TO RENDER IMAGES/GIFs USING URLS YOU NEED TO PUT THEM BETWEEN "" 
E.g: /image url "https://i.imgur.com/funnymeme.jpeg" 100 100**

## GUI
- **Drag & drop** images/GIFs around your screen  
- **Resize** by using the border and corner indicators  
- **Right-click** an image/GIF to toggle the transparency slider  
- **Hold Alt + corner** to rotate images  
- **Slideshows** (SLIDES button):  
  - Set display duration per image  
  - Cycle manually with J/K keys (toggle auto-mode) – keys can be changed in settings  
- **Overlays** (OVERLAY button):  
  - Render images/GIFs in full-screen  
  - Automatically scale to your resolution  
  - Create overlay slides to have multiples overlays and cycle through them
- **URL** lets you render images directly using an **IMGUR URL**. E.g: https://i.imgur.com/funnymeme.jpeg

![Rendered Images Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/528a23c80e4b346b9964337808a7748a6c6cfe4a.png)

## Folder Location
- All images/GIFs are located in the `imageoverlay` folder in the .minecraft directory
- Overlays are located in the `imageoverlay/overlays` folder
- Twitch images are located in the `imageoverlay/twitch` folder
